questionHtml: Write down the null and alternative hypotheses.
markschemeHtml:
(let μc= population mean for chinchilla rabbits, μs= population mean for sable rabbits)

H0:μc=μs           A1

H1:μc>μs          A1


Note: Accept an equivalent statement in words, must include mean and reference to “population mean” / “mean for all chinchilla rabbits” for the first A1 to be awarded.
         Do not accept an imprecise “the means are equal”.


[2 marks]

meta.title: Write down the null and alternative hypotheses.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.11—Expected, observed, hypotheses, chi squared, gof, t-test
